title: Nursery Rhyme. DXCVIII. Local.
content:
There was a little nobby colt,
            His name was Nobby Gray;
        His head was made of pouce straw,
            His tail was made of hay;
                He could ramble, he could trot,
                He could carry a mustard-pot,
                Round the town of Woodstock,
                Hey, Jenny, hey!
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DXCVIII. Local."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
